nodes.title: LTX2 NAG(Negative Strength) 부정 강도 설정, Alpha 조절
memo
widgets_values:
nag scale 13~15, nag alpha 0.4~0.5을 기준으로 동영상 생성시 원하지 않는 장면을 수정하세요. (대표적으로 자막 문제 등)

Modify unwanted scenes when creating videos based on nag scale 13 to 15 and nag alpha 0.4 to 0.5. (text, subtitles)

subtitles, captions, on-screen text, text overlay, bottom text, lower-third text, lower third graphics, subtitles at the bottom, bottom captions, burned-in subtitles, closed captions, korean subtitles, english subtitles, dialogue text, speech text, lyrics text, auto-generated captions, title text, label text, words, letters, symbols, logo, watermark

groups.title: Please move this workflow to another location and save it separately. (이 워크플로우는 다른곳에 이동시켜서 따로 저장해놓으세요)
